positive: A stylized, highly symmetrical mandala featuring intertwining geometric forest elements: crystalline ferns, stylized crescent moons, and ethereal root structures. The composition must be centered and circular, emphasizing clean, continuous lines suitable for single-color screen printing. Use a limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, emerald green, and warm gold on a negative space background. The style should blend Art Deco precision with sacred geometry, creating a strong, visible silhouette. High contrast, crisp details, flat graphic quality, perfect symmetry, illustration quality.
